# GITS — AI Agency & Digital Product Studio

> GITS (Gwer Intelligent Tech Solutions) is a premium AI agency and digital product studio based in Abuja, Nigeria, serving clients globally across 12+ countries. We build custom software, web applications, mobile apps, AI automation systems, and WhatsApp AI agents for startups and businesses that need production-grade technology.

## What GITS Does

GITS is an AI agency. We design and engineer digital products that drive business growth.

**Core services:**
- **Custom Software Development** — SaaS platforms, online marketplaces, booking systems, membership platforms, customer portals, vendor management systems, business management software, enterprise applications. Starting from $5,000.
- **Website Design & Development** — Business & corporate websites, e-commerce stores (Stripe, Paystack), landing pages, portfolio sites, event websites, marketing websites, product showcases. Built with Next.js. Mobile-first, fast-loading, SEO-optimized. Starting from $500.
- **AI & Business Automation** — AI assistants, chatbots, lead qualification systems, workflow automation, reporting automation, WhatsApp automation, email automation, AI-powered business tools, custom AI integrations using OpenAI GPT-4 and Claude. Starting from $1,000.
- **WhatsApp AI Agents** *(Flagship)* — Custom AI-powered conversational agents built on WhatsApp Business API. Automate customer support, qualify leads, process sales, book appointments, track orders. Multi-language support. CRM and helpdesk integration. Human handoff workflows. Built with OpenAI GPT-4, Claude, and custom LLMs. Starting from $1,000.
- **Mobile App Development** — iOS and Android apps using React Native. MVP-focused, clean architecture, app store submission included. Starting from $3,000.
- **Internal Tools & CRM Systems** — Custom CRMs, inventory management, admin dashboards, employee portals, reporting platforms, vendor management, operations management. Starting from $2,000.
- **Integrations & APIs** — Payment integrations (Stripe, Paystack), REST & GraphQL APIs, CRM integrations (HubSpot, Salesforce), WhatsApp & email integrations, data sync pipelines, webhooks, third-party service connections. Starting from $1,000.

## Who GITS Serves

- Startups building their first product or MVP
- Growing businesses ready to scale their operations
- Organizations replacing legacy systems
- Service providers needing custom workflows
- E-commerce businesses needing smooth checkout and automation
- SaaS teams losing trials or users after signup
- Multi-branch businesses needing centralized operations
- Customer support teams handling high volume
- Sales teams qualifying leads at scale

## Industries

E-commerce, healthcare, legal services, professional services, SaaS startups, fintech, education, logistics, hospitality, consumer apps, fashion & retail.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Mobile:** React Native, Expo
- **Backend:** Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
- **AI / LLMs:** OpenAI GPT-4, Anthropic Claude, custom fine-tuned models, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), vector databases
- **Integrations:** Stripe, Paystack, WhatsApp Business API, HubSpot, Salesforce, REST, GraphQL, webhooks
- **Cloud:** AWS, Vercel, Cloudflare, Docker
- **DevOps:** CI/CD, automated testing, monitoring

## Our Process

1. **Discovery** — Align goals, users, constraints, and success metrics. Define scope and a realistic plan.
2. **Strategy & Architecture** — Map flows, data, and integrations. Choose the right stack and structure for scalability.
3. **Design & Build** — Design interfaces and ship in iterations with constant feedback, quality checks, and clear progress.
4. **Launch** — Deploy, monitor, and validate in production. Ensure performance, stability, and smooth rollout.
5. **Scale & Support** — Optimize, expand features, and support long-term growth. Act as your technical partner.

## Why GITS

- **Senior-only team.** No juniors billed as seniors. Every engineer is senior-level.
- **Product-thinking.** Every build starts from a business outcome, not a feature list.
- **Honest scoping.** We tell you when something does not need to be built yet.
- **98% on-time delivery.** Across 40+ projects in 12+ countries.
- **No handoffs.** The same team that scopes your project builds it.
- **Production-grade.** We do not build "demo AI." Every system has guardrails, audit logs, fallback handling, and observability.
- **Fixed pricing.** No surprise invoices. All pricing shared upfront.
- **Global delivery.** Remote-first. Based in Abuja, Nigeria. Serving US, UK, Europe, and Africa.
